title: Bachu Ni Benpani
overview: Bachu Bapodara, a miser and health freak, is on a free trip to Bangkok. A mystery woman, wild adventures, and heartfelt twists make his journey hilarious and emotional. 'Bachu Ni Benpani' is a perfect film for the whole family.
